calendar.matters:
MOTION Notice Of Motion To Strike Satisfaction Of Judgment And Ordering The Recorders Of Marin And San Francisco Counties To Expunge From Its Records The Recodation Of Any Copy Of Such Satisfaction
Off Calendar Dec-15-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING -- PLAINTIFF CHASE MANHATTAN BANK, USA, N.A., A CORP.'S MOTION To Strike Satisfaction Of Judgment And Ordering The Recorders Of Marin And San Francisco Counties To Expunge From Its Records The Recodation Of Any Copy Of Such Satisfaction -- Granted, no opposition filed. (302/KMM) JUDGE: KEVIN M. MCCARTHY, CSR: MITCH LYON, CSR #6840
